name: Wipro
about: Wipro campus hiring evaluates candidates across Aptitude, Logical Reasoning, Verbal Ability, Coding, Technical Interview, and HR Interview. Three tracks — Project Engineer, Elite, and Turbo — offer packages from 3.5 to 10 LPA.

roles.description: Standard Wipro campus hire track for software engineering roles across service lines.

rounds.name: Online Assessment — Aptitude
rounds.instructions: 20 questions covering arithmetic, data interpretation, and logical reasoning

rounds.name: Online Assessment — Coding
rounds.instructions: 2 coding problems — typically Easy to Medium DSA

rounds.name: Technical Interview
rounds.instructions: Core CS concepts, project discussion, and 1 live coding problem

roles.description: Accelerated Wipro track for high-performers with advanced packages and faster growth.

rounds.name: Online Assessment
rounds.instructions: Aptitude + Coding in one session, higher bar than Project Engineer

rounds.name: Technical Interview I
rounds.instructions: Two DSA problems + system design basics + OOP deep dive

rounds.name: Technical Interview II
rounds.instructions: Cloud fundamentals, DBMS optimization, and situational problem solving

rounds.name: HR Interview
rounds.instructions: Leadership, adaptability, and Wipro cultural alignment

roles.description: Top-tier Wipro track for exceptional candidates targeting highest packages and fast-track leadership roles.

rounds.name: Turbo Assessment
rounds.instructions: Highest difficulty OA — 4 sections with proctored environment

rounds.name: Technical Interview I
rounds.instructions: Live coding on hard problems + system design end-to-end

rounds.name: Technical Interview II
rounds.instructions: Architecture discussions, ML fundamentals, advanced database concepts

rounds.name: HR + Culture Fit
rounds.instructions: Leadership potential, long-term career vision, and Wipro Turbo culture alignment
